feed.title: Aroostook County Probate Court
feed.subtitle: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Sitewide WordPress /feed/ exists but is not probate-specific. Page lists a 'Probate Court Calendar' PDF per year — a new year's calendar being added is a useful change signal. KNOWN ISSUE: aroostook.me.us has been returning HTTP 403 to this bot's requests (likely WAF bot-blocking) since mid-2026; kept enabled so the status dashboard surfaces it and it recovers automatically if the block is lifted.
